body.title: announce/broker.py — AnnounceBroker + ManifestAssembler (in-memory, no IDLE)
body.result: AnnounceBroker + ManifestAssembler at announce/broker.py. resolve_announce(envelope)→Manifest. Filters registry to online+allowed; builds ToolBinding/ChannelSubscription/StateRef/ACL from profile. agent_datacenter commit 4fe83a6.
body.description:
AnnounceBroker takes an IdentityEnvelope and returns a Manifest. ManifestAssembler reads the agent's profile, the registry, and the active devices, filters by profile.devices_allow_list, and assembles the manifest. Slice 1: synchronous in-process resolution; no IDLE wait, no inotify, no live invalidation. The broker is registered as a sub-device of skeleton in slice 2 — slice 1 is just the assembly logic standalone.

**Affected files:** /home/akien/dev/src/agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/announce/broker.py (NEW)
**Design rules:** assembly-pure-given-state (deterministic for same inputs); offline-devices-excluded
**Scope boundary:** in — AnnounceBroker(profiles_dir, registry, devices) class; resolve_announce(envelope) → Manifest; ManifestAssembler.filter_by_profile(profile, available_devices) → list[ToolBinding]; out — IMAP wiring (slice 2), inotify (slice 3), MCP exposure (slice 3), reconnect-on-invalidate
**Test plan:** test_broker_assembles_for_igor_profile (binds inference + cognition state_refs); test_broker_assembles_for_cc_profile (binds inference, no state_refs); test_broker_excludes_offline_devices; test_broker_etag_changes_when_registry_changes
